tickers.name: NVIDIA
tickers.why_it_matters: Dominant share of AI training compute. GPU + NVLink + CUDA = the full stack. The single most important AI-infrastructure name.

tickers.name: TSMC
tickers.why_it_matters: Foundry monopoly at 3nm / 2nm. CoWoS capacity is the binding AI constraint. 61% HPC, packaging sold out through 2026.

tickers.name: Broadcom
tickers.why_it_matters: Custom ASICs for Google/Meta + networking silicon. Co-Packaged Optics roadmap. The 'NVIDIA alternative for hyperscalers' bet.

tickers.name: Samsung Electronics
tickers.why_it_matters: Memory (DRAM/NAND) + foundry + displays. HBM3E catch-up vs SK Hynix is the binary story.

tickers.name: SK Hynix
tickers.why_it_matters: HBM leader — primary supplier to NVIDIA. Cleanest memory play on AI training demand.

tickers.name: Micron
tickers.why_it_matters: HBM3E/HBM4 — one of three suppliers (vs Samsung, SK Hynix). HBM is the binding constraint on AI training. Cyclical leveraged play.

tickers.name: AMD
tickers.why_it_matters: MI300/MI350 is the only credible non-NVIDIA training silicon at scale. Margin expansion if AI-compute share grows from low single digits.

tickers.name: ASML Holding
tickers.why_it_matters: EUV monopoly + High-NA EUV ramp. Largest photonics business on earth. Cyclical demand on memory + China weakness.

tickers.name: Intel
tickers.why_it_matters: Foundry comeback bet (18A, 14A). Photonic-I/O internal effort. Negative trailing earnings; turnaround story.

tickers.name: Lam Research
tickers.why_it_matters: Etch + CMP — critical for HBM TSV and advanced logic. WFE leverage to memory + packaging investment.

tickers.name: Arm
tickers.why_it_matters: ISA tax on every mobile + most datacenter Arm-server CPUs. Sky-high P/E reflects monopoly + royalty growth.

tickers.name: Applied Materials
tickers.why_it_matters: Deposition + ion implant. Photonic packaging adjacency via emerging tools.

tickers.name: IBM
tickers.why_it_matters: Superconducting qubits roadmap (Heron, Condor, Kingfisher). Quantum services revenue line.

tickers.name: Texas Instruments
tickers.why_it_matters: Analog — cyclically depressed earnings. Idle 300mm fab capacity = optionality.

tickers.name: Qualcomm
tickers.why_it_matters: Mobile SoC + RF. Cheapest large-cap semi by P/E. PC + auto diversification grinding.

tickers.name: GE Vernova
tickers.why_it_matters: GE spinout. Grid + gas + wind + nuclear (Hitachi JV).

tickers.name: KLA
tickers.why_it_matters: Process control + inspection. Highest margins in semicap. Wins as nodes shrink + packaging complexity grows.

tickers.name: Palo Alto Networks
tickers.why_it_matters: Platform play: firewall + SASE + SOC. Largest pure-play cyber.

tickers.name: MediaTek
tickers.why_it_matters: Mobile + auto + edge AI SoC. Datacenter ASIC efforts.

tickers.name: Analog Devices
tickers.why_it_matters: Analog + signal-chain. High-quality cyclical.

tickers.name: CrowdStrike
tickers.why_it_matters: Endpoint detection — Falcon platform. Post-incident comeback.

tickers.name: Marvell Technology
tickers.why_it_matters: Inphi optical DSP + custom AI ASIC for AWS. The 'silicon photonics interconnect' bet. Co-packaged optics roadmap.

tickers.name: Corning
tickers.why_it_matters: Optical fiber + Gorilla Glass + display. Photonic packaging glass.

tickers.name: Tokyo Electron
tickers.why_it_matters: Coater/developer monopoly + etch. WFE leverage.

tickers.name: Sony Group
tickers.why_it_matters: 63.6% of global image sensor market (2025). Whole-conglomerate ticker; pure-semi exposure is partial.

tickers.name: Infineon
tickers.why_it_matters: Auto power + microcontroller + SiC.

tickers.name: Cambricon
tickers.why_it_matters: China's NVIDIA alternative. Domestic sovereign-AI bet.

tickers.name: Advantest
tickers.why_it_matters: AI-chip test monopoly. Earnings highly leveraged to NVIDIA volumes.

tickers.name: Constellation Energy
tickers.why_it_matters: Largest US nuclear fleet. Microsoft 20-year PPA on Three Mile Island. AI datacenter power direct beneficiary.

tickers.name: Cadence Design Systems
tickers.why_it_matters: EDA duopoly. Chip-design-as-software with strong AI tailwind in design automation.

tickers.name: Synopsys
tickers.why_it_matters: EDA duopoly with Cadence. AI-design-flow leverage. Ansys acquisition closing.

tickers.name: ASE Technology
tickers.why_it_matters: Largest OSAT — packaging + test. CoWoS adjacent.

tickers.name: SMIC
tickers.why_it_matters: China's TSMC. Geopolitical proxy.

tickers.name: Ciena
tickers.why_it_matters: Coherent optical networking systems. +147% YTD on AI DC interconnect demand.

tickers.name: Coherent Corp
tickers.why_it_matters: InP laser-chip in-house + transceivers. ~25% transceiver share. 1.6T pluggable + CPO roadmap. Two-firm story with Lumentum.

tickers.name: Lumentum
tickers.why_it_matters: 200G/lane EML lasers — only volume shipper. $2B NVDA strategic investment Mar 2026. Multi-year supply commitments. +966% LTM.

tickers.name: STMicroelectronics
tickers.why_it_matters: Auto + industrial MCU + ToF sensors + SiC. Pan-European cyclical.

tickers.name: Astera Labs
tickers.why_it_matters: Aries retimers, Taurus smart cable modules, Scorpio switches. Scale-up connectivity inside AI racks. PCIe → optical transition play.

tickers.name: Vistra
tickers.why_it_matters: Comanche Peak nuclear + gas. AI-power play.

tickers.name: Cameco
tickers.why_it_matters: Largest uranium miner. Westinghouse JV with Brookfield. Pure-play uranium thesis.

tickers.name: ON Semiconductor
tickers.why_it_matters: Auto CMOS image sensor + power. SiC arm spun out.

tickers.name: Teledyne Technologies
tickers.why_it_matters: Industrial imaging incl. FLIR thermal. Defense + scientific.

tickers.name: MACOM
tickers.why_it_matters: High-speed analog for optical + RF. 200G/400G/800G transceiver enablers.

tickers.name: IonQ
tickers.why_it_matters: Trapped-ion qubits. Cloud access via AWS/Azure. Highest revenue among quantum pure-plays.

tickers.name: Zscaler
tickers.why_it_matters: Zero-trust network — proxy-based SSE.

tickers.name: MKS Instruments
tickers.why_it_matters: Vacuum + photonics for semi manufacturing + advanced packaging. +74% YTD.

tickers.name: BWX Technologies
tickers.why_it_matters: Naval reactor + SMR + medical isotopes. Government revenue stability.

tickers.name: Applied Optoelectronics
tickers.why_it_matters: Datacenter transceivers — Microsoft is largest customer.

tickers.name: D-Wave Quantum
tickers.why_it_matters: Annealing quantum — different paradigm. Optimization niche.

tickers.name: Cognex
tickers.why_it_matters: Industrial machine vision — factory automation pure-play.

tickers.name: Rigetti Computing
tickers.why_it_matters: Superconducting qubits — pure-play SPAC. Volatile.

tickers.name: AXT Inc
tickers.why_it_matters: InP, GaAs substrates for photonics + lasers.

tickers.name: Navitas Semiconductor
tickers.why_it_matters: GaN + SiC for AI power supplies — datacenter PSU efficiency.

tickers.name: LG Display
tickers.why_it_matters: OLED panels — Apple + auto.

tickers.name: Hamamatsu Photonics
tickers.why_it_matters: Photomultipliers + SPADs + scientific sensors. Quantum sensing + medical.

tickers.name: IPG Photonics
tickers.why_it_matters: Fiber lasers — industrial cutting + welding. Cyclical industrial exposure.

tickers.name: NuScale Power
tickers.why_it_matters: Small modular reactor pure-play. Long timelines, optionality on AI datacenter power demand.

tickers.name: Universal Display
tickers.why_it_matters: OLED emitter materials + IP — duopoly with Samsung.

tickers.name: nLIGHT
tickers.why_it_matters: Defense + industrial lasers. Directed energy upside.

tickers.name: Valeo
tickers.why_it_matters: Tier-1 auto supplier — first to mass-volume LiDAR (Mercedes Drive Pilot).

tickers.name: Himax Technologies
tickers.why_it_matters: Display drivers + WLO optics for AR glasses + CIS.

tickers.name: Hesai
tickers.why_it_matters: Volume leader for automotive LiDAR. Robotaxi exposure.

tickers.name: Ouster
tickers.why_it_matters: Digital LiDAR + camera + AI vision after StereoLabs acquisition. Physical-AI platform pivot.

tickers.name: Wolfspeed
tickers.why_it_matters: SiC pure-play — auto/grid. Balance-sheet repair story.

tickers.name: ams-OSRAM
tickers.why_it_matters: Optical + depth + multi-illumination sensors + LEDs. Restructuring story.

tickers.name: POET Technologies
tickers.why_it_matters: Silicon-photonics interposer architecture for transceivers and co-packaged optics. Micro-cap, technology bet.

tickers.name: Aeva Technologies
tickers.why_it_matters: FMCW LiDAR — Nvidia DRIVE Hyperion win.

tickers.name: indie Semiconductor
tickers.why_it_matters: Auto chips incl. LiDAR exposure via acquired iC-Haus.

tickers.name: Lumibird
tickers.why_it_matters: Lasers for defense + scientific + medical.

tickers.name: Arqit Quantum
tickers.why_it_matters: Quantum-safe encryption keys — small UK pure-play.

tickers.name: MicroVision
tickers.why_it_matters: MEMS-based LiDAR pivot from AR display.

tickers.name: Innoviz Technologies
tickers.why_it_matters: Automotive LiDAR — only one integrated into an L3 program with SOP 2026/2027.

tickers.name: AEye
tickers.why_it_matters: Adaptive LiDAR — micro-cap.

tickers.name: IQE plc
tickers.why_it_matters: Epi-wafer leader for VCSELs + photonic lasers. Lumentum strategic partnership.

tickers.name: Luminar
tickers.why_it_matters: Volvo, Mercedes wins. Stretched balance sheet.
